name: mercado-livre-mcp
description: Read-only Mercado Livre API access for Codex through a bundled MCP server.

interface.shortDescription: Inspect Mercado Livre seller, listing, quality, and ads data.
interface.longDescription: Mercado Livre MCP gives Codex read-only access to Mercado Livre API data through a bundled MCP server. It helps non-technical users inspect seller reputation, listing quality, purchase experience, catalog attribute completeness, Product Ads metrics, item search, listing exposure, and product metadata using natural-language prompts.
defaultPrompt: Check if Mercado Livre is configured
Review listing quality for this item
